tags.name: oauth
tags.description: OAuth-adjacent public flows used by the reference implementation

tags.name: grants
tags.description: Grant initiation, approval, revocation, and introspection

get.summary: Return RFC 8414 authorization-server metadata with the reference provider-connect capability extensions.
Return RFC 9728 protected-resource metadata advertising the PDPP query base and owner-self-export capabilities.

post.summary: Register a public client through the reference dynamic client registration profile.

401.description: Missing or invalid initial access token

post.summary: Stage a PDPP data-access request and receive a pending-consent request_uri plus authorization URL.

403.description: Request rejected because the resolved grant contract is invalid

post.summary: Approve a pending data-access request through the JSON consent surface used by tests and automation.

200.description: Grant approved and client token issued

403.description: Grant is malformed or no longer valid

post.summary: Start the owner device flow used for owner-self-export and dashboard bootstrap.
Exchange an approved owner device_code for an owner bearer token.

500.description: Server error while exchanging the device code

post.summary: Inspect token activity and, for active client tokens, the bound grant projection.
Revoke a grant and all tokens minted from it.

403.description: Grant is malformed or no longer valid

get.summary: List connector or source boundaries visible under the bearer token, with stream summaries and coarse capability hints.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: Return the caller-visible source/stream capability graph in one shot. Owner tokens see every owner-visible connector; client tokens see only the grant's source and streams. Each stream entry reuses the per-stream metadata shape (schema, query declarations, field capabilities, expand capabilities, freshness).

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: List streams available under the current grant or owner scope.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: Return stream metadata including declared query capabilities and advisory freshness.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: List records in a stream under grant enforcement. Supports logical-cursor pagination, exact and declared range filters, and changes_since.

schema.description: Opaque logical pagination cursor. Encodes (cursor_field, primary_key) position.
`beginning` for initial sync, or an opaque changes-since token from next_changes_since. Distinct from list-page cursors.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: Compute a single-stream grant-safe aggregation. Supports count, numeric sum, numeric/date min/max, grouped counts, and existing exact/range filters over declared fields.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: Fetch a single record by primary key under grant enforcement, with optional declared expansion.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request

get.summary: Optional lexical retrieval extension: search records across authorized streams by text. See the lexical-retrieval capability spec.

schema.description: Opaque logical pagination cursor. Encodes (cursor_field, primary_key) position.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. unsupported v1 query parameter, missing q)

403.description: Grant does not permit a named stream (client tokens only)

410.description: Cursor expired or refers to an unknown snapshot

get.summary: Experimental optional extension: semantic retrieval across authorized streams by text. See the semantic-retrieval capability spec. Unstable in v1.

schema.description: Opaque logical pagination cursor. Encodes (cursor_field, primary_key) position.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. unsupported v1 query parameter, missing q)

403.description: Grant does not permit a named stream (client tokens only)

410.description: Cursor expired or refers to an unknown snapshot

post.summary: Upload connector/runtime-owned blob bytes for a bound record.

200.description: Canonical content-addressed blob identity for the uploaded bytes

get.summary: Fetch blob bytes authorized by the caller having discovered the referencing record under grant.

403.description: Grant does not permit this request
